summary: Progress Dashboard (Track tab redesign) tested. All 4 tabs functional. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Animated.stagger with useNativeDriver:true not working on web (content invisible), fixed by skipping animation on web; (2) Compliance session labels showing abbreviated backend values 'ME Lower/Upper', 'DE Lower/Upper' instead of mapped 'Heavy/Speed' labels - fixed by extending mapSessionLabel map.
critical_code_review_comments: Program tab 52-Week section only shows if yearPlan?.phases exists — works correctly for user_a (General Strength plan shown)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Track/Progress tab fully working. All 4 segments switch correctly, compliance labels now show Heavy/Speed/Recovery. Animations work on both native and web.
rca_of_issue: Bug 1 RCA: Animated.stagger with useNativeDriver:true uses native driver (CSS transform) on web which conflicts with Expo web renderer. Fix: Platform.OS === 'web' check to setValue(1) immediately. Bug 2 RCA: Backend analytics/compliance returns abbreviated session type names ('ME Lower','DE Upper') not in mapSessionLabel map. Fix: Added abbreviated aliases to the map.
